question: Which show did I start watching first, 'The Crown' or 'Game of Thrones'?
reasoning_summary: From memory, user started watching Game of Thrones about a month before 2023-05-29, i.e., around 2023-04-29. User started watching The Crown on a Sunday afternoon, and finished season 3 in 14 days ending 2023-05-29, so start date is 2023-05-15. Comparing dates, Game of Thrones (2023-04-29) was started before The Crown (2023-05-15).
